% ABNT-like formatting (NBR 14724)
\usepackage{mathptmx}        % Times New Roman-style font
\usepackage{indentfirst}     % Indent first paragraph of each section
\setlength{\parindent}{1.5cm}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\titleformat{\section}{\normalfont\bfseries\large}{\thesection}{1em}{}
\titleformat{\subsection}{\normalfont\bfseries\normalsize}{\thesubsection}{1em}{}
